review_title: Finally an SEO tool that gets the rock rolling!
description: I joined the digital team one year ago. Back at that time, they already had been through several SEO audits and had a massive backlog. Like many organizations, we were failing at implementing the recommendations that were provided to us by our SEO partner (and I won't mention the audit reports of SEMrush). Thanks to Semactic, we moved away from the SEO whirlwind and started to act upon tangible, lead measures. We are clearly starting to win as we implement on-site optimizations on a weekly basis. This approach is starting to pay off and we can't wait to extend this project to other countries within our organization.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: * Action-oriented * Constantly improving automatic recommendations * Easy-to-use * Evolving very fast (constantly improving the tool) * Excellent customer support
cons: * Still young (a few bugs here and there) * Recommendations are goofy from time to time (based on AI, i.e. it still need to learn) * You still need an SEO agency (see the two points above)

review_title: Un partenaire SEO fiable, engagé et à l’écoute
description: Nous sommes très satisfaits de l'accompagnement de Semactic. Ils sont réactifs, à l’écoute et surtout force de proposition. Nous apprécions tout particulièrement leur capacité à bien comprendre nos enjeux et à apporter des recommandations concrètes. Leurs conseils précieux à propos du GEO nous permettent également d'anticiper au mieux les évolutions du search et d’explorer de nouvelles pistes pertinentes. C’est un partenaire sérieux, engagé et avec qui il est vraiment plaisant de travailler au quotidien.
author: Nadège D.
pros: - La facilité d'utilisation de la plateforme - L'accompagnement de qualité et très pédagogue (nous sommes une équipe peu formée en matière de SEO)
cons: La plateforme peut parfois présenter quelques petites limites ou ajustements mineurs à faire, mais rien de bloquant en soi.

description: The Semactic team is very proactive, willing to listen to the users' advice and just overall excellent collaboration
author: Rosita M.
pros: 1. How easy for businesses to use this tool (don't have to be an SEO expert) 2. It features a small definition next to a feature (for example, what is bounce rate, impressions etc.) 3. Clear comparison of KW with our competitors
cons: 1. The only thing that would be useful is to have the dates by default when a specific country was onboarded

review_title: Very efficient tool. Increases your productivity and visibility. Take control of your SEO!
description: We have had a fruitful collaboration since the beginning. We have had the chance to be beta testers. This has enabled us to come up with ideas for improvements. Semactic has always been attentive and very responsive to suggestions. The software is constantly being improved.
author: Floriane P.
pros: It allows us to prioritise our work. To intelligently implement and monitor our strategy.
cons: Being able to insert information into the tool. This will be done in the future. The team really listens to all our comments and business needs.

review_title: Great product, great feature, great team.
author: Vincent R.
pros: This software allows you to track your ranking on your selected keywords compared to your competitor, give recommendations about your top keyword.
cons: Some developments are still on the way, to improve this software.

review_title: Very instinctive and useful tool to improve our SEO
description: Very satisfying. The team is quick and efficient in responding. The training was practical and straightforward, and we quickly familiarized ourselves with the tool. The rest of the experience has been following recommendations and see our SEO getting better.
author: Guillaume D.
pros: The recommendations are full of well-detailed next steps to improve our SEO. The team is available and helpful.
cons: We wanted to be able to see all our recommendations to base our strategy on it. The team reacted quickly and gave us the possibility to do so.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: SEMRush is brilliant. This is better.
description: I don't have time to be a full time SEO specialist. Big, well known tools are getting to the point where they're just as complicated as the algorithms they're trying to decipher. Semactic does away with ALL of the complexity, and just tells you what you need to do to improve your SEO, task by task. You can spend your precious time implementing the right changes instead of badly interpreting too much data and then getting the implementation wrong.
author: Chris L.
pros: It's so easy to use - you don't need to be a data analyst anymore, you just need to implement what it asks. It's brilliant.
cons: It's still a relatively new tool so it is evolving all the time - there are a few glitches, but nothing is bad.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Plateforme très facile et agréable d'utilisation. Equipe au top et très disponible.
description: Semactic nous permet d'optimiser le référencement de notre site web facilement sans besoin de support externe.
author: Elise G.
pros: La facilité d'utilisation, les schémas très visuels
cons: Jusqu'à présent, je n'ai rencontré aucun problème.
